name: Fast Auto Loans, Inc.
description_short: Fast Auto Loans, Inc. provides title loans and registration loans up to $15,000 in Arizona with same-day funding, requiring only a vehicle and valid ID regardless of credit history.
description_long:
Fast Auto Loans, Inc. is a multi-location lender operating in Arizona (Glendale, Peoria, and Phoenix) specializing in secured vehicle-based loans. The company was established to serve customers in need of rapid emergency funding who may have difficulty qualifying for traditional bank loans. They market themselves as a direct local lending source with multiple physical locations and an online application option.

The company offers two primary loan products: Title Loans (up to $15,000) and Registration Loans (up to $2,500). Title loans require a lien-free vehicle title, valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and the vehicle for inspection. Registration loans use the vehicle registration instead of the title and require a checking account. Both products advertise same-day approval and funding in as little as 30 minutes. The application process begins online or in-person, with local store representatives following up via phone to explain terms and verify required documentation.

Fast Auto Loans emphasizes accessibility for customers with bad or no credit history, stating that approval depends more on vehicle condition and required documents than credit score. They operate multiple Arizona locations and accept applicants regardless of credit type. The company provides both English and Spanish-language services and maintains an online application system alongside in-store visits. They also offer a payment portal for existing customers.

As a title and registration loan provider, Fast Auto Loans operates in a high-cost lending category. While same-day funding and minimal credit requirements are genuine advantages for emergency situations, customers should be aware that title loans are secured by vehicles and typically carry higher interest rates and fees than traditional loans. The website does not display specific APR, rate, or fee information, requiring customers to contact the company or visit in-person for pricing details—a common practice in this sector that can obscure true borrowing costs.
pros: Same-day approval and funding available in as little as 30 minutes
Accepts all credit types; approval not based on credit score
Multiple Arizona locations (Glendale, Peoria, Phoenix) plus online application
Offers two loan types: Title Loans up to $15,000 and Registration Loans up to $2,500
Direct local lending with phone follow-up and in-person support
Online and in-person application options for customer convenience
cons: Rates, fees, and APR information not disclosed on website; customers must contact for pricing
Requires lien-free vehicle title for title loans (not available to all vehicle owners)
Title loans are secured by vehicle, creating repossession risk if payments are missed
Registration loans capped at $2,500, limiting borrowing capacity for larger emergencies
No information provided about loan term lengths, payment schedules, or default consequences
best_for: Customers with bad credit who need emergency cash quickly and own a vehicle outright
People facing unexpected expenses (medical bills, car repairs, evictions) with same-day funding needs
Borrowers who prefer local, in-person lending relationships over online-only lenders
Spanish-speaking Arizona residents seeking accessible emergency lending
diagnosis: Fast Auto Loans is best suited for Arizona residents with immediate cash needs who own vehicles outright and cannot qualify for traditional loans due to credit issues. The primary caveat is that title loans carry significant risk (vehicle repossession) and typically high costs; customers must obtain and compare specific rate and fee information before committing, as this information is not disclosed on the website.
services: Online Title Loan FAQs and Information
